emails.subject: Speaker for GSB
emails.body: Hi Greg! Would you consider doing this? If so, I'll have John McMillan call you directly. Thanks! --Christie. Forwarded by Christie Patrick/HOU/ECT on 12/01/2000 01:35 PM "McMillan, John" <mcmillan_john@gsb.stanford.edu> on 12/01/2000 01:14:14 PM

emails.subject: RE: Speaker for GSB
emails.body: RE: Speaker for GSB Sorry I took so long to respond, but if they are still interested, I would like to learn more about it.

emails.subject: RE: Speaker for GSB
emails.body: RE: Speaker for GSB Great Greg! I'll leave you a voice mail--after I speak with Jonh McMillan at GSB and can give you a more substantive 'heads up', I'll have him call you directly--thanks for your help! --Christie.
